title: AI Joins The Dark Side
summary: It shouldn’t come as a surprise to hear that Hollywood loves AI. Several of the world’s most iconic movies touch on AI in some way, with C3PO of Star Wars fame being one of the best-known examples. Until now, AI has mostly been on the good side of power, but recently, our favorite enterprise made a decision that slightly alters this picture. Keep reading for more. Artykuł AI Joins The Dark Side pochodzi z serwisu DLabs.AI .
author: Katarzyna Rojewska
